what: Display all CLAUDE.md files found in the project tree as a 2-column grid with max 5 visible items
why: CLAUDE.md files are project/package instructions distinct from .claude/rules/*.md scoped rules; showing them grouped by folder helps users navigate the project's instruction hierarchy

decisions.reason: Reuse GET/PUT /api/project/claude/rules/:relativePath for reading and writing CLAUDE.md files
decisions.rationale: CLAUDE.md files are markdown files within the project; the existing rules read/write endpoint already handles arbitrary paths with security guards

decisions.reason: Show folder path as primary label, CLAUDE.md as subtitle
decisions.rationale: Users identify these files by their location (root, packages/app, etc.) not by filename since all are named CLAUDE.md
